text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's New Year's, and I'm relaxing in my office when
I receive an invitation from Yaeno Muteki to
usher in the new year with a shrine visit.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I do find it a little odd that she specifically wants
to rendezvous in a park, but I go along with it.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Happy New Year, Trainer.
choice_data_list:
Happy New Year! Let's hope this year is another
good one!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Yes, indeed.
choice_data_list: Shall we head to the shrine?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
In a moment, please! There's something important
I have to tell you first.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Inhale...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Please forgive me for what happened at the
Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I let my emotions get the best of me and behaved
so disgracefully!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I made an embarrassing spectacle of myself in
front of you. If there was a hole nearby, I would
have crawled right into it.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I vow to never again repeat that blunder! Please
accept my sincerest apologies!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wasn't especially troubled by Yaeno Muteki's
passionate outburst after the Arima Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But it looks like she's unable to forgive herself for
having let her emotions dictate her behavior.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I'll exercise greater restraint in the future!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: However, when I said I would defeat Oguri...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I meant it. That's my goal, and it hasn't changed.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
My conduct may have been shameful, but
everything I said came from the heart.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
When the crowd was going wild for Oguri at the
Arima Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It dawned on me that their enthusiasm had
nothing to do with me.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Everyone was so caught up in the excitement of
seeing Oguri and Tamamo...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Nobody mentioned the Classic Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It felt as if everyone had forgotten about the
Satsuki Sho and the Japanese Derby... And about
Chiyono O, Ardan, and me.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I couldn't accept that.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Thus, I have decided to challenge Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
If I can best her—the racer at the center of
everyone's attention—it will surely make a lasting
impression and keep us from being forgotten!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I'll defeat Oguri with a performance that will live
on in the memory of the masses!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: That is what I have chosen.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: My... obsession?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Yes, that's right! This fierce emotion... this must
be obsession!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I've been suppressing these intense emotions,
believing they must never surface...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hearing this, I come to understand why she's been
struggling to find an obsession of her own.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If an obsession becomes too strong, it can mutate
into something wild. She must have been
disciplining herself unconsciously to keep her
emotions in check.
choice_data_list:
It's fine as long as you wield those feelings
properly.

It's fine as long as you wield those feelings
properly.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Yes. My desire to pursue this obsession has
become so strong that I can no longer suppress it.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
But that's the type of passion I need if I'm going
to make it to the finish line.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Thus, I have no choice but to dedicate myself to
mastering the blaze fierce and water still, to
avoid overstepping any boundaries.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I intend to channel this obsession towards winning
races. I will harness its potential as I run, without
letting it take hold of me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As per our original plan, Yaeno Muteki and I pay
a visit to the shrine.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It seems we've avoided the crowds. Luck is on our
side!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Have you decided what you'll be praying for?
choice_data_list: For your hard work to be rewarded.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
For me to stay healthy? My body is robust. I don't
think my health warrants any concern.
choice_data_list: I'm worried about you training too hard.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her that I'm concerned she might overdo
things by drawing on sheer willpower to continue
even when she's exhausted.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Ngh... An uncomfortably feasible concern.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I do believe that I know my body well, but I'll
endeavor to be careful all the same.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
After all, I don't wish to cause you any undue
vexation.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Let's skip training today and use this time to rest.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After visiting the shrine, Yaeno Muteki and I head
to a teahouse to enjoy some mochi and take it
easy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell Yaeno Muteki that I'm hoping for her hard
work and commitment to training to be rewarded.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: You prayed that I be rewarded?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Trainer, you are a paragon among mentors!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I must return the favor to you...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: By training! Even more training!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Well then, I best get to it! Please excuse me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before I even have a chance to say that she
should at least relax on New Year's, she runs off.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Hm?! You want to beat Oguri Cap as well?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Is that how fiercely you wish to join me in my
goals? I read you loud and clear!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Let's go on a boat ride!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Given the deep connection we share in this
moment, I believe we could row a boat in perfect
unison!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It'll be an apt opportunity to show how in sync we
are!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not fully sure what she means, but since she
insists, I agree to go boating with her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki's intuition turns out to have been
surprisingly on the mark.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We maneuver the boat with such ease and
perfectly synced strokes that we end up drawing
attention from passersby.
